skills.name: orderly-api-authentication
skills.description: Complete authentication guide for Orderly Network - EIP-712 wallet signatures for EVM accounts, Ed25519 message signing for Solana accounts, and Ed25519 signatures for API requests

skills.name: orderly-deposit-withdraw
skills.description: Handle token deposits and withdrawals across chains, including allowance approval, vault interactions, and cross-chain operations

skills.name: orderly-onboarding
skills.description: Agent onboarding for Orderly Network - omnichain perpetual futures infrastructure, MCP server, skills, and developer quickstart

skills.name: orderly-one-dex
skills.description: Create and manage a custom white-label DEX using Orderly One - launch paths, deployment, custom domains, graduation, theming, and admin operations

skills.name: orderly-positions-tpsl
skills.description: Monitor positions in real-time, configure Take-Profit/Stop-Loss orders, and manage risk with leverage settings

skills.name: orderly-sdk-debugging
skills.description: Debug and troubleshoot common issues with the Orderly SDK including errors, WebSocket issues, authentication problems, and trading failures.

skills.name: orderly-sdk-dex-architecture
skills.description: Complete DEX architecture guide including project structure, provider hierarchy, network configuration, TradingView setup, and provider configuration.

skills.name: orderly-sdk-install-dependency
skills.description: Install Orderly SDK packages and related dependencies (hooks, UI, features, wallet connectors) using the preferred package manager.

skills.name: orderly-sdk-page-components
skills.description: Use pre-built page components from Orderly SDK to quickly assemble complete DEX pages (TradingPage, Portfolio, Markets, Leaderboard, etc.)

skills.name: orderly-sdk-react-hooks
skills.description: Reference guide for using Orderly React SDK hooks - useOrderEntry, usePositionStream, useOrderbookStream, useCollateral, and more

skills.name: orderly-sdk-theming
skills.description: Customize the visual appearance of your Orderly DEX with CSS variables, colors, fonts, logos, and TradingView chart styling.

skills.name: orderly-sdk-trading-workflows
skills.description: Complete trading workflows for Orderly Network DEX applications, from wallet connection through order execution, position management, and withdrawal.

skills.name: orderly-sdk-wallet-connection
skills.description: Comprehensive guide to integrating wallet connection in Orderly Network DEX applications, supporting both EVM (Ethereum, Arbitrum, etc.) and Solana wallets.

skills.name: orderly-trading-orders
skills.description: Place, manage, and cancel orders using REST API or SDK hooks. Covers market, limit, IOC, FOK, POST_ONLY order types and batch operations

skills.name: orderly-ui-components
skills.description: Build trading interfaces using pre-built React components - OrderEntry, Positions, TradingPage, WalletConnect, Sheets, Tables

skills.name: orderly-websocket-streaming
skills.description: Establish authenticated WebSocket connections for real-time orderbook, execution reports, positions, and balance updates
